name: xiaodai-test-expert-marketplace
description: 效贷业务线功能测试专家私有市场，提供测试用例全流程生成（文档整理→需求评审→测试点→用例→入库）与时间节省追踪能力。v1.4.0 新增用户故事目录自动管理、腾讯文档智能表格实时同步修复、花名册强制读取校验。

plugins.name: xiaodai-testing-expert
plugins.description: An AI expert for Xiaodai business line functional testing, powered by ai-testcase-workflow-skill covering the full pipeline from requirement consolidation to knowledge archiving. v1.4.0 adds user story directory auto-management, Tencent Docs cloud sync fix, and mandatory roster-based identity verification.
